---
title: "Introduction to R"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/intro-r.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/intro-r.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/intro-r.pdf){download="intro-r.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/intro-r.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

  - [Base R cheat sheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/base-r.pdf){target="_blank"}: A quick reference for basic R syntax, data types, and common functions. It covers more that what we cover in this session, but can be a handy reference as you code.
